sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the blocks have moved! They're now in the LEFT part of the maze, near the bottom. I can see the orange and blue blocks at the bottom-left of the gray area. This is different from before when they were at the right side.
The blocks moved from cols 34-38 to cols ~19-23 (the left chamber). The LEFT actions worked this time!
Let me check the exact positions and see if the blocks are now in the left chamber near the white cross.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current block positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Blocks:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['O', 'b'] and n['pixels'] > 5:
        print(f"  color={n['color']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\nWhite cross:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check icon
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nIcon (rows 55-60, cols 1-9):")
for i in range(55, 61):
    print(f"  Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][1:9]}")

# Check area around blocks
print("\nArea (rows 30-50, cols 18-35):")
for i in range(30, 50):
    row_str = ascii_lines[i][18:35]
    highlighted = ''
    for ch in row_str:
        if ch in ['O', 'b', 'W', 'w']:
            highlighted += ch
        elif ch == 'G':
            highlighted += '#'
        elif ch == 'c':
            highlighted += '.'
        else:
            highlighted += ch
    print(f"  Row {i}: {highlighted}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I can see the blocks are at:
- Orange: rows 45-46, cols 19-23
- Blue: rows 47-49, cols 19-23
The white cross is at rows 31-32, cols 21-22.
Looking at the area map:
- Rows 30-39: ###########.....# (wall on left, passage on right)
- Rows 40-44: .#####..........# (wall on left, passage on right)
- Rows 45-46: .OOOOO########### (blocks on left, wall on right)
- Rows 47-49: .bbbbb########### (blocks on left, wall on right)
So the blocks are in the left chamber at the bottom. The white cross is at rows 31-32, which is higher up in the left chamber.
To get the blocks to the white cross, I need to move them UP. Let me try moving UP.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Blocks are at rows 45-49, cols 19-23 (left chamber, bottom)
# White cross is at rows 31-32, cols 21-22 (left chamber, middle)
# Need to move UP to get blocks to the white cross

# Move UP to align with white cross
action(['UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
